title: Converting T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL with confidence
summary: Google Cloud demonstrated using Gemini as an AI tutor to help developers convert T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL during cloud migration. The tool explains conversion logic and teaches PostgreSQL expertise, supporting complex refactoring tasks like converting stored procedures to Common Table Expressions.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video shows Gemini acting as an AI tutor for converting T-SQL code to PL/pgSQL during cloud migration. It matters because database migrations require not just translated code but understanding of the conversion logic and PostgreSQL conventions behind it. The tool explains why each conversion works and builds PostgreSQL expertise, supporting complex refactoring such as turning stored procedures into Common Table Expressions.
